confidence_notes: Extracted skills with explicit project or work experience evidence. Excluded 'Framer Motion' and 'CSS animations' as they are design/animation techniques rather than standalone skills. Excluded 'GitHub Pages' and 'npm' as deployment/package management tools rather than core technical skills. All extracted skills have concrete project backing.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio Site
projects.summary: Static portfolio website with smooth scroll animations, CSS Grid layout, and custom dark mode toggle. Deployed on GitHub Pages at emmawalsh.design. Demonstrates foundational frontend skills with focus on visual design and user interaction.

projects.name: UI Component Library
projects.summary: CSS-only reusable component library (buttons, cards, modals, tooltips) published as npm package with zero JavaScript dependencies. All components meet WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards for contrast ratios. Demonstrates advanced CSS skills and accessibility awareness.

projects.name: Landing Page Clones
projects.summary: Pixel-perfect recreations of Stripe, Linear, and Vercel landing pages using HTML and CSS only. Focused on mastering flexbox, grid, custom properties, and CSS animations. Practice-oriented projects demonstrating CSS layout and design precision.

projects.name: Framer Motion Showcase
projects.summary: Collection of React page transition animations exploring Framer Motion animation APIs. Pure frontend exploration with no backend or data persistence. Demonstrates React component knowledge and animation library familiarity.

impact_highlights.description: Published UI Component Library as npm package with zero JavaScript dependencies, achieving WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility compliance across all components.
Deployed personal portfolio website to production on GitHub Pages with custom interactive features including dark mode toggle and smooth scroll animations.

confidence_metrics.confidence_notes: All extracted skills have explicit project or work experience evidence. HTML, CSS, and JavaScript are demonstrated across multiple projects. React is used in Framer Motion Showcase. Figma and Git are explicitly listed in both skills section and work experience. No aspirational skills included.
